Diapers: Looks like a thick padded garment or folded pack; often soft white material with colored prints, adhesive tabs, or a large rectangular plastic bag package showing a diaper photo/icon and size (S/M/L/XL).
Milk powder: Usually a metal can (tin) with a large round plastic lid or seal; cylindrical container with printed nutrition text, baby/adult branding, and scoop/serving icons. Often looks like a labeled canister on shelves.
Shoes: Looks like a single shoe or pair displayed on a rack/shelf; visible sole, toe box, heel, and inner insole. Can be leather/fabric, flats/sneakers, often shown at an angle like a store display.
Socks: Long or ankle-length knit fabric; often hanging on hooks with a cardboard header tag. Clear sock shape (tube + heel) with stripes/patterns; sometimes see multiple colors bundled together.
Hat: Looks like a soft fabric cap with a rounded crown; may have a curved brim (baseball cap) or beanie style. Often displayed hanging or stacked; you can see the front panel/logo area and the cap opening.
Toys: Usually colorful plastic items or boxed sets; bright packaging with cartoon graphics, big product photos, and playful shapes. Often looks like a toy box on a shelf (e.g., blasters, dolls, blocks) rather than a plain household item.
Underwear: Typically soft fabric garments folded or packaged; may be in a plastic bag/box with model photos, size labels, and brand logos. Visual cues include elastic waistband, brief/boxer shape, and multi-pack bundles.
Air conditioner: Often a tall tower-style appliance or a large boxy unit with strong vents/grilles and a minimal control panel; looks like a cooling machine designed for rooms (more sealed, solid body) rather than a small tabletop device.
Air conditioning fan: Portable air cooler / cooling fan. Usually a standing unit with a large front louvered vent (horizontal slats), sometimes a visible water level window/tank area and control knobs/buttons. Often looks like an evaporative cooler rather than a sealed AC.
Baby carriage: A baby stroller with wheels and a push handle, usually with a fabric seat and canopy.
Baby crib: A baby bed with wooden or metal railings on all sides.
Baby Furniture: Baby related furniture or boxed baby equipment such as baby chairs or baby supplies.
Baby handkerchiefs: Soft square baby towels or cloth wipes sold in colorful packs.
Baby tableware: Baby feeding utensils such as baby spoons, forks, bowls packaged in boxes.
Baby washing and nursing supplie: Baby hygiene products like baby wipes or baby cleaning kits.
Badminton: Badminton rackets and shuttlecock sports equipment.
Band aid: Small adhesive bandages packaged in small rectangular boxes.
Basin: A large round bowl used for washing or holding water.
Basketball: A round rubber sports ball with black lines used for basketball.
Bath lotion: Plastic bottle of body wash or bath lotion with pump or flip cap.
Bedding set: A packaged set of bed sheets, pillowcases, and blankets.
Biscuits: Packaged snack cookies or biscuits in boxes or plastic wrappers.
Bowl: Round dishware used for food, usually ceramic or plastic.
Cake: Packaged cake dessert or bakery product.
Can: Metal cylindrical can container for drinks or food.
Carbonated drinks: Soda drinks packaged in cans or bottles.
Care Kit: A packaged personal care kit with grooming tools.
Chewing gum: Small packs or boxes of chewing gum.
Chocolates: Chocolate candy bars or boxed chocolates.
Chopping block: Flat wooden or plastic cutting board used for chopping food.
Chopsticks: Pairs of long thin sticks used for eating food.
Coat hanger: Plastic or metal hanger used for hanging clothes.
Cocktail: Alcoholic cocktail drinks packaged in cans or bottles.
Coffee: Coffee drinks or coffee powder packaged in cans or bags.
Comb: Hair comb with thin teeth used for grooming hair.
Cooking wine: Bottled cooking wine used for cooking.
Cotton swab: Small sticks with cotton tips used for cleaning ears.
Cutter: Utility knife or box cutter used for cutting materials.
Dairy: Milk or dairy drinks packaged in bottles or cartons.
Desk lamp: A small table lamp used for lighting desks.
Dinner plate: Flat round plate used for serving food.
Disposable cups: Single use cups made from plastic or paper.
Draw bar box: Rolling suitcase luggage with wheels and pull handle.
Dried beans: Packaged dried beans in plastic bags.
Electric fan: Household electric fan with blades and protective grill.
Electric frying pan: Electric cooking pan with heating base.
Electric Hot pot: Electric cooking pot used for hot pot meals.
Electric iron: Household iron used for ironing clothes.
Electric kettle: Electric water kettle for boiling water.
Electric steaming pan: Electric steamer appliance for cooking food.
Electromagnetic furnace: Induction cooker with flat cooking surface.
Emulsion: Cosmetic lotion or moisturizing emulsion bottle.
Facial Cleanser: Face washing cleanser in tube or bottle.
Facial mask: Face mask skincare product in flat packets.
Flour: Bags of wheat flour used for baking.
Food box: Plastic food storage container with lid.
Football: Soccer ball with black and white panels.
Forks: Metal or plastic forks used for eating.
Fresh-keeping film: Plastic wrap roll used for food preservation.
Guozhen: Powdered fruit drink mix packaged in bags.
Hair conditioner: Hair conditioner bottles used after shampoo.
Hair drier: Electric hair dryer used for drying hair.
Hair dye: Hair coloring product in boxes or bottles.
Hair gel: Hair styling gel in jars or tubes.
Ice cream: Frozen dessert packaged in boxes or wrappers.
Instant noodles: Packaged instant noodle cups or bags.
Jacket: Clothing outerwear jacket hanging on racks.
Juicer: Kitchen appliance used to extract juice from fruits.
Knapsack: Backpack bag worn on the back.
Knives: Kitchen knives with metal blade and handle.
Liquor and Spirits: Alcoholic spirits bottles such as vodka or whiskey.
Lotus root flour: Powdered lotus root starch food product.
Makeup tools: Cosmetic tools such as sponges or brushes.
Mouth wash: Liquid mouthwash bottle used for oral hygiene.
Mug: Cup with handle used for drinking beverages.
Pencil case: Case used to store pens and pencils.
Pot shovel: Cooking spatula utensil used for frying.
Quick-frozen Tangyuan: Frozen sweet rice balls packaged in bags.
Quick-frozen Wonton: Frozen wonton dumplings packaged in bags.
Red wine: Bottle of red wine alcoholic beverage.
Skate: Skateboard or roller skate sports equipment.
Soap: Bar soap used for washing hands or body.
Soup ladle: Large spoon used for serving soup.
Soymilk: Soy milk beverage packaged in cartons or bottles.
Spoon: Metal or plastic spoon used for eating.
Storage bottle: Bottle used for storing liquids or food.
Tea: Packaged tea leaves or tea bags.
Tea beverage: Ready to drink bottled tea beverage.
Toothpaste: Tube of toothpaste for brushing teeth.
Trash: Plastic trash bin or garbage container.
